name: unreal-scala-lsp
description: Instant Scala navigation for the AI era — go-to-definition and find-references in ~10ms, no compiler or build server needed

unrealScalaLsp.serverPath.description: Path to the unreal-scala-lsp native binary or assembly jar

unrealScalaLsp.usePresentationCompiler.description: Presentation compiler magic for precise go-to-definition. It works until it doesn't — then AST saves the day.

unrealScalaLsp.debug.description: Enable verbose debug logging in the LSP server (visible in Output > Unreal Scala LSP)
